description: Workflow to process, validate, and finalize user entity asynchronously
name: user_entity_processing_workflow

transitions.description: Enrich the user entity with additional data like timestamps and version
transitions.end_state_description: User entity enriched with additional data
transitions.name: enrich_user

transitions.description: Validate the enriched user entity for required fields and correctness
transitions.end_state_description: User entity validated successfully or with errors
transitions.name: validate_user
transitions.start_state_description: User entity enriched with additional data

transitions.description: Finalize the user entity by setting status based on validation results
transitions.end_state_description: User entity marked as ready or error
transitions.name: finalize_user
transitions.start_state_description: User entity validated successfully or with errors
